commit.name: Stock Ticker Dashboard
commit.description: Stock price display with color-coded changes and responsive grid
commit.prompt:
Build a stock ticker dashboard that displays stock prices with live updates. Layout:
- Header with "Market Watch" title and a "Last Updated" timestamp (updates in real-time)
- Responsive grid of stock cards (3 per row on desktop, 1 on mobile)
- Each card shows: ticker symbol (large, bold), company name, current price formatted with 2 decimals, change amount, and change percentage
- Color coding: green text/border for positive change, red for negative change
- A subtle arrow icon (▲ or ▼) next to the change percentage
- Brief flash/highlight animation when a stock price updates

Initial stock data comes from props. Live price updates arrive via stream events — merge them into the displayed data. Use design system CSS variables for all colors and spacing.

stocks.description: Array of stocks with symbol, name, price, change, changePercent

stream.description: Real-time stock price updates from the agent

priceUpdate.description: Updated price data for one or more stocks

getStockDetail.label: Stock Detail
getStockDetail.description: Get detailed info for a specific stock (52-week range, volume, etc.)

issues.description: Stock cards lack semantic structure — consider wrapping each card in an article element or adding role='region' to provide context for screen readers
issues.fix: Stock cards lack semantic structure — consider wrapping each card in an article element or adding role='region' to provide context for screen readers

issues.description: Arrow icons (▲/▼) are rendered as plain text without aria-label or title attribute — add aria-label to describe direction (e.g., 'Price up' or 'Price down')
issues.fix: Arrow icons (▲/▼) are rendered as plain text without aria-label or title attribute — add aria-label to describe direction (e.g., 'Price up' or 'Price down')

issues.description: Last Updated timestamp section uses generic Stack/Row elements — consider using a live region (aria-live='polite') to announce updates to screen reader users
issues.fix: Last Updated timestamp section uses generic Stack/Row elements — consider using a live region (aria-live='polite') to announce updates to screen reader users

issues.description: Stock symbol appears twice (line 162 and 165) — reduce redundancy and ensure screen reader users don't hear it twice; consider using aria-label on the Heading to provide context
issues.fix: Stock symbol appears twice (line 162 and 165) — reduce redundancy and ensure screen reader users don't hear it twice; consider using aria-label on the Heading to provide context

issues.description: Redundant ticker symbol display: 'symbol' is shown twice in each card (line 161-162 as overline and line 164-165 as heading), creating visual clutter and wasted space
issues.fix: Redundant ticker symbol display: 'symbol' is shown twice in each card (line 161-162 as overline and line 164-165 as heading), creating visual clutter and wasted space

issues.description: Unbalanced visual hierarchy within stock cards: change amount and change percentage are split across Row with 'justify=between' (line 182), causing them to stretch to opposite edges and appear disconnected from each other
issues.fix: Unbalanced visual hierarchy within stock cards: change amount and change percentage are split across Row with 'justify=between' (line 182), causing them to stretch to opposite edges and appear disconnected from each other

issues.description: Inconsistent spacing between card content sections: Divider (line 179) is placed with only margin, but the gap between other elements is var(--ggui-spacing-3), making the visual grouping feel uneven
issues.fix: Inconsistent spacing between card content sections: Divider (line 179) is placed with only margin, but the gap between other elements is var(--ggui-spacing-3), making the visual grouping feel uneven

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates solid use of design tokens and responsive grid layout, but the card styling with inline media queries is non-standard and the flashing animation lacks visual polish. The component is incomplete (truncated source code) and missing the change/percentage display and arrow icons mentioned in the original spec.
